name: Twill Button-Up Shirt
description: A new collection that celebrates over a hundred years of heritage, inspired by our vintage Big Shirt archives and redesigned for today. This long-sleeve button-up shirt is in a soft, lightweight twill fabric and relaxed-fit silhouette.

attributes.care: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low

name: A&F Resort Shirt
description: Made from an elevated, structured cotton-linen blend fabric, this short-sleeve button-up shirt is perfect for a sunny day. The relaxed fit, resort-style camp collar, embroidery details, and straight hem create a look that feels both effortless and elevated.

attributes.care: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low

name: 100% Linen Icon Button-Up Shirt
description: Long-sleeve button-up shirt in a soft 100% linen fabric and relaxed-fit silhouette. Features an embroidered icon at the left chest, a classic collar and a curved hem.

name: Chambray Denim Button-Up Shirt
description: A new collection that celebrates our one hundred year history, inspired by our vintage archives and redesigned for today. This long-sleeve button-up shirt is in a soft denim fabric and oversized-fit silhouette. Features a classic button-down collar and embroidered crest detail.

name: Graphic Button-Up Shirt
description: A new collection that celebrates over a hundred years of heritage, inspired by our vintage Big Shirt archives and redesigned for today. This long-sleeve button-up shirt is in a lightweight 100% cotton fabric and relaxed-fit silhouette.

attributes.care: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low

name: Premium Heavyweight 2.0 Graphic Tee
description: Our comfortable short-sleeve tee in our heavyweight 275g fabric and oversized-fit silhouette, a reimagined version of our original Premium Heavyweight Tee. Features bodega-inspired graphic details at the left chest and back, and a crew neckline.

attributes.care: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low

name: Essential Cropped Full-Zip Hoodie
description: Your new favorite hoodie. In a brand-new oversized, cropped fit, this full-zip hoodie in our soft fabric is bound to keep you feeling warm and looking stylish all year.

name: Terry Script Logo Full-Zip Hoodie
description: Comfortable full-zip hoodie in our super soft French terry fleece fabric and oversized, drop-shoulder fit. Features an embroidered script logo at the left chest, a zip-up front, side pockets and a banded hem and cuffs.

name: Tennis Scenic Crew Sweater
description: Comfortable crew in our soft sweater-knit fabric. Features an all-over scenic tennis-inspired graphic detail, crew neckline and a banded hem and cuffs.

name: Classic Essential Tee
description: Our short-sleeve tee in our substantial 180g fabric. Features an updated classic-fit silhouette, a straight hem, crew neckline and an updated bound collar.

attributes.care: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low

name: Baggy Jean
description: Our baggy jeans, relaxed and baggy-fitting through the leg with a slight puddle at the shoe, in our 100% cotton no-stretch fabric and broken-in denim feel. Features an ecru wash and clean hem.

name: Linen-Blend Relaxed Straight Trouser
description: Our classic pant in a cleaned up silhouette and soft linen-blend fabric. Fits relaxed through the thigh and straight through the leg.

name: Loose Jean
description: Our classic loose jeans that are relaxed and loose-fitting through the hip and thigh in our 100% cotton no-stretch fabric and broken-in denim feel. Features a white wash and clean hem.

name: Menswear Baggy Trouser
description: Our classic pant in a cleaned up silhouette and everyday menswear fabric. Fits wide through the leg and sits higher at the ankle.

name: Linen-Blend Baggy Trouser
description: Our classic pant in a cleaned up silhouette and lightweight linen-blend fabric. Fits wide through the leg and sits higher at the ankle.

name: Wool-Blend Mac Coat
description: Our single-breasted mac coat in our soft wool-blend fabric and longer length with a relaxed-fit silhouette. Features classic lapel detail, tonal trims and lining, back vent detail, front-button closure, side pockets and interior chest pocket.

name: McLaren Varsity Bomber Jacket
description: Classic bomber jacket in a soft faux wool fabric and relaxed-fit silhouette, featuring McLaren varsity-inspired embroidered graphic patch details throughout, side pockets, snap-up front and tipping details at elastic cuffs and waistband.

name: Hooded Puffer
description: Our heavyweight puffer jacket in a cotton-blend fabric and relaxed-fit silhouette. Features fill to protect against the elements, side zip pockets with exterior chest zipper pocket, zip-up front, cinched cuffs and a detachable hood.

name: Vintage-Inspired Vegan Leather Bomber Jacket
description: Our vintage-inspired bomber jacket in a vegan leather fabric and relaxed-fit silhouette. Features a classic fold-down collar, zip-up front, seaming details, functional front pockets with side pocket entry and banded hem and cuffs.

name: Wool-Blend Trucker Jacket
description: Our versatile trucker jacket in our new wool-blend fabric and a relaxed-fit silhouette. Features side pockets, zip-up front, fold-down collar with a convertible mockneck button closure and lightweight interior lining.

name: Essential Everyday Easy Tee
description: Our comfy short-sleeve tee in a cotton jersey fabric, perfect for everyday wear. Features an easy-fit silhouette, crew neckline and straight hem.

attributes.care: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low

name: The A&F Bella Bra-Free Linen-Blend Cami
description: Our collection built to make going bra-free that much smoother. This flattering cami top is in our soft linen-blend fabric and body-skimming silhouette. Features a seamed-in bra with removable pads, adjustable tie detail, V-neckline and adjustable cami straps.

name: Linen-Blend Smocked Tie-Front Top
description: Flattering top in our comfortable linen-blend fabric. Features adjustable tie-front detail, all-over smocked detail, ruffle hem and a V-neckline.

name: Bra-Free 90s Cami
description: Our collection built to make going bra-free that much smoother. Slim-fitting 90's-style top in our cotton-blend seamless fabric, featuring removable pads for added coverage, adjustable straps, and a square neckline.

name: Sunday Terry Off-The-Shoulder Top
description: Our comfy long-sleeve top in our soft French terry fleece fabric and Sunday silhouette. Features a slash neckline, on-trend seaming details and banded cuffs.

name: Bra-Free Lace Button-Through Midi Dress
description: Flattering midi dress in our sleek textured silk fabric, featuring lace details throughout, functional buttons for multiple ways to style, and a seamed-in bra with removable pads to go bra-free.

name: 100% Cotton A&F Bra-Free Dylan Midi Dress
description: Our collection built to make going bra-free that much smoother. This flattering midi dress is in our classic poplin fabric. Features a scoop neckline with picot-trim detail, back smocking, adjustable straps, a dipped waistline with a flowy skirt and a seamed-in bra.

name: Bra-Free Ruched Flowy Maxi Dress
description: Our collection built to make going bra-free that much smoother. Flattering maxi dress in our elevated crinkle chiffon, featuring a flowy skirt, plunge neckline, and drop waist detail, plus a seamed-in bra with removable pads.

name: A&F Dylan Bra-Free Denim Midi Dress
description: Our collection built to make going bra-free that much smoother. Flattering midi dress is in our soft denim fabric, featuring a picot-trimmed scoop neckline, back smocking and a dipped waistline with a flowy skirt.

name: Chambray Bra-Free Button-Through Smocked Mini Dress
description: Flirty mini dress in our Chambray fabric, featuring buttons down the front of the body, smocking details on the bodice, adjustable straps, and a seamed-in bra with removable pads to go bra-free.
